prompt: Create a vibrant anime-style vertical streamer portrait of Miu, a cyber-kawaii virtual idol seated at a streaming desk in a neon bedroom studio. She has extremely long cotton-candy pink twin-tails with flowing strands, oversized black-and-pink star hair clips on both sides, small dangling crystal charms, and a playful ahoge curl on top; her face is deliberately covered by a large flat pastel pink rectangular censor block centered over the entire face. Dress her in a black, white, hot-pink, and cyan oversized techwear hoodie with printed graphics, star patches, zipper details, drawstrings, and glossy trim, worn off the shoulders over a cropped strappy top, layered belts, a pleated black mini skirt, chain accessories, star pendants, a choker, and a glowing star necklace. Include exactly 6 prominent star accessories: two large star hair clips, one star choker charm, one glowing chest necklace charm, one hanging belt-chain star, and one star patch on the sleeve. The scene is a cozy neon livestream setup with a large microphone and pop filter on the left, a bright pink keyboard at the bottom, a mug on the right with Japanese hashtag text, pastel plush cats in the background, and wall monitors filled with cute chat bubbles, hearts, cat icons, and the glowing name logo miu. Use a saturated magenta, violet, cyan, and electric blue color palette, glossy highlights, detailed linework, dramatic rim lighting, soft bloom, bokeh neon signs, and a high-detail modern anime illustration style. The composition should be a close-up three-quarter bust-to-thigh view, centered on the character, with the background slightly blurred but still readable as a streamer room. Add visible Japanese-style chat messages such as こんみう〜!!! and pink heart reactions on the right monitor, while keeping the overall mood energetic, cute, futuristic, and idol-streamer themed.
